name: Spiked Coffee, Tea, and Cocoa
recipeInstructions:
1. Hazelnut Cocoa: Mix 1 cup of cocoa with 2 tablespoons (tbsp) of Hazelnut Liqueur and add 1 cinnamon stick.
2. Orange Coffee: Add 2 tbsp of Orange Brandy Cordial to a cup of Viennese roast coffee. Top with a twist of orange peel.
3. Creamy Almond Coffee: In a large mug, combine 3 cups (cups) of coffee with 1 cup of scalded heavy cream and 2 tbsp of Almond Liqueur.
4. Chilled Mexican Coffee: Put a scoop of Vanilla Ice Cream into a mug. Pour 2 tbsp of Coffee Liqueur over it. Fill the mug with chilled strong coffee.
5. Berry Tea: To a cup of freshly brewed tea, add 2 tbsp of Raspberry Vodka Cordial (or Blackberry Cordial). Add a lemon slice and honey to taste.
6. Grown-up Cocoa: Add 2 tbsp of Sour Cherry Vodka to a cup of hot cocoa. Top with whipped cream and a little shaved chocolate or cocoa powder.
